name: online_gamma_poisson
notes: Per-cell Gamma-Poisson posterior λ ~ Gamma(s0+Σy, r0+n); a new verified day updates E[λ] by ADDING TWO NUMBERS — no refit. This is the model the live serverless cron updates each run (see api/clearlane/V3_SELF_LEARNING.md). λ is expected violations/day, never congestion; cell-level only.
